art_style.summary: Casual 2D puzzle game featuring soft, candy-like blocks with heart imprints on a warm brown background.
art_style.rendering: 2D vector-style with soft shading to create a faux-3D beveled appearance.
art_style.line_work: No outlines on game pieces; thick, contrasting outlines on UI text.
art_style.palette: Warm and sweet: dark chocolate browns, soft pinks, cream/light yellows, with bright UI accents.
art_style.shading: Soft gradients and edge highlights for a tactile, rounded feel.
art_style.scale_feel: Chunky, stylized, and tactile, resembling physical candy or game pieces.

assets.name: Block Debris Particles
assets.scenario_prompt:
Using the reference crop, recreate ONLY this asset as a clean 2D mobile game sprite.

Asset: Block Debris Particles
Category: effect
Description: Small, 3D-looking flying debris particles, including tiny cubes and swirl shapes in cream and pink colors.
Gameplay role: Particle effect accompanying a line clear.

=== STYLE LOCK (must match exactly across every asset in this game) ===
Overall: Casual 2D puzzle game featuring soft, candy-like blocks with heart imprints on a warm brown background.
Rendering technique: 2D vector-style with soft shading to create a faux-3D beveled appearance.
Line work: No outlines on game pieces; thick, contrasting outlines on UI text.
Palette: Warm and sweet: dark chocolate browns, soft pinks, cream/light yellows, with bright UI accents.
Shading: Soft gradients and edge highlights for a tactile, rounded feel.
Scale / proportions: Chunky, stylized, and tactile, resembling physical candy or game pieces.
DO NOT use any of these styles: pixel art, photorealistic, gritty, sci-fi, hand-drawn sketch, low-poly 3D, flat vector.
Match this style regardless of what the asset depicts — do not default to genre tropes (e.g. ninjas as pixel art, robots as voxel, fantasy as painterly) unless the lock above says so.

Preserve the source asset's silhouette, color family, proportions, camera angle, and readable details.
Improve video compression artifacts and make the asset crisp and production-quality.
Center the asset with comfortable transparent padding.

Remove everything that is not the asset: no background, no wall, no character, no hand cursor, no UI, no smoke/trail/impact particles unless explicitly part of the target.
Use a transparent background PNG when supported. If transparency is not preserved, use a plain simple background that can be removed cleanly.
Do not add new objects or change the gameplay read.
assets.animation_notes: Bursts outward from the cleared line and fades out.
assets.visual_description: Small, 3D-looking flying debris particles, including tiny cubes and swirl shapes in cream and pink colors.

=== STYLE LOCK (must match exactly across every asset in this game) ===
Overall: Casual 2D puzzle game featuring soft, candy-like blocks with heart imprints on a warm brown background.
Rendering technique: 2D vector-style with soft shading to create a faux-3D beveled appearance.
Line work: No outlines on game pieces; thick, contrasting outlines on UI text.
Palette: Warm and sweet: dark chocolate browns, soft pinks, cream/light yellows, with bright UI accents.
Shading: Soft gradients and edge highlights for a tactile, rounded feel.
Scale / proportions: Chunky, stylized, and tactile, resembling physical candy or game pieces.
DO NOT use any of these styles: pixel art, photorealistic, gritty, sci-fi, hand-drawn sketch, low-poly 3D, flat vector.
Match this style regardless of what the asset depicts — do not default to genre tropes (e.g. ninjas as pixel art, robots as voxel, fantasy as painterly) unless the lock above says so.
